messages.content: 翻译下面这段Though the on-chip Yb3+ -implanted photonic resonators based on the TFLNOI has already been fabricated recently, the on-chip microlasers based on the Yb3+ -doped TFLNOI have not been demonstrated due to the low Yb3+ ion concentration and surface shallow ion implantation [28].
尽管基于TFLNOI的On-chip Yb3+注入光子谐振器已最近被制造，但基于Yb3+掺杂TFLNOI的On-chip微型激光由于Yb3+离子浓度低和表面浅层离子注入而尚未得到证明。[28]

翻译这一段：In summary, we have demonstrated an on-chip Yb3+ -doped LN microdisk laser. We have measured the intrinsic Q factors of 3.56 × 105 at 976 nm and 1.1 × 106 at 1514 nm in the fabricated Yb3+ -doped LN microdisk. We observe the multi-mode laser emissions with a slope efficiency of 0.53% in the band from 1020 to 1070 nm when pumped at 984 nm. The Yb3+ -doped LN microdisk lasers feature a low pump threshold of 103 µW at room temperature. Thanks to the strong χ (2) nonlinearity of LN, both intracavity SHG and SFG processes are observed in the Yb3+ -doped LN microdisk. The on-chip Yb3+ -doped LN microdisk laser offers great potential for biosensing applications and integrated photonic chips. However, the Yb3+ -doped LN microdisks are unstable for generating a laser and SHG/SFG now due to the opto-mechanical and opto-thermal effect. We next plan to fabricate the more stable microring structure on Yb3+ -doped LN film. We can also bring periodic poling in the Yb3+ -doped LN microresonator to boost SHG and SFG efficiency in the future [31,32].

总之，我们展示了一个基于芦荟酸铌掺杂的On-chip Yb3+ 微盘激光器。我们在制造的Yb3+掺杂的LN微盘中测量了976 nm和1514 nm处的本征Q因子分别为3.56 × 105和1.1 × 106。当在984 nm泵浦时，在1020 nm到1070 nm的波段中观察到多模激光发射，其斜率效率为0.53%。 On-chip Yb3+掺杂LN微盘激光器在室温下具有低泵浦阈值，为103微瓦。由于LN的强χ（2）非线性特性，观察到Yb3+掺杂LN微盘中腔内SHG和SFG过程。 On-chip Yb3+掺杂LN微盘激光器具有在生物传感应用和集成光子芯片中应用的巨大潜力。 但是，由于光机械和光热效应，Yb3+掺杂的LN微盘目前对于产生激光和SHG / SFG不稳定。我们接下来计划在Yb3+掺杂的LN薄膜上制造更稳定的微环结构。我们还可以在未来在Yb3+掺杂的LN微腔中引入周期性极化来提高SHG和SFG效率[31,32]。

翻译这一段Lasing characterization of the Yb3+ -doped LN microdisk under a pump of a 984 nm wavelength. (a) Evolution of the lasing modes under different pump powers. (b) Multi-mode lasing under the pump power at 617 µW. (c) Yb3+ -doped LN microdisk lasing power with the increasing pump power. The blue line is the linear fitting of the lasing power. A lasing threshold can be derived at 103 µW, and the slope efficient of the lasing is around 0.53%.
在984 nm泵浦下的Yb3+掺杂的LN微盘的激光特性描述：（a）在不同泵浦功率下激光模式的演变。（b）泵浦功率为617 µW时的多模激光。（c）Yb3+掺杂的LN微盘激光功率随泵浦功率递增。蓝线是激光功率的线性拟合。激光阈值可在103 µW处得出，激光的斜率效率约为0.53%。

翻译这一段：Intra-cavity frequency conversions from the pump laser and the Yb3+ -doped LN microdisk laser to generate a new frequency component at a visible wavelength through SHG and SFG. The insets show the photograph of the microdisk at the visible (left) and IR (right) regions.
通过SHG和SFG，从泵浦激光和Yb3+掺杂的LN微盘激光器中进行腔内频率转换，以产生可见波长的新频率分量。插图显示了在可见光（左）和红外（右）区域的微盘照片。
转英文：(a)衍射光学元件实现分束，(b)偏振分束立方实现分束
(a) Diffraction optical element for beam splitting, (b) Polarizing Beam Splitter Cube for beam splitting.
转英文：左：四路激光光束直写均匀性测试，右：大尺寸不同规格化工芯片展示
Left: Uniformity test of direct writing of four laser beams. Right: Display of large-sized normalized chips with different specifications.
转英文:(a)高斯光场经过普通透镜后焦点附近的传输分布，(b)高斯光直接经过锥棱镜整形后形成贝塞尔光束的纵向传输分布，(c)高斯光先经过相位板后经过锥棱镜整形后的纵向光场分布示意图

(a) Transmission distribution of Gaussian light field near the focus after passing through a common lens, (b) Vertical transmission distribution of Bessel beam formed by direct shaping of Gaussian light by a conical prism, (c) Schematic diagram of longitudinal light field distribution after Gaussian light passes through a phase plate and then is shaped by a conical prism.
转英文： PLACE制备工艺原理图
Schematic diagram of the PLACE fabrication process.
转英文：4英寸晶圆上加工30cm长延时线a-b，以及调制器阵列c-f
Fabrication of a 30 cm-long delay line from point A to point B and a modulator array from points C to F on a 4-inch wafer.
转英文：经过PLACE工艺之后芯片不同位置深度的表征
Characterization of the depths at different positions on the chip after the PLACE process.
